title: hymenophyllum microcarpum
intro: Hymenophyllum microcarpum, also known as the Small-fruited fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is native to New Zealand and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum microcarpum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
